prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens in an indoor room with a yellow-green wall. A man in a dark teal top is crouched or kneeling beside a large golden-colored dog. The dog is close to him, and the man appears to be embracing or holding the dog near his face. Part of a table with a blue-and-white checked cloth is visible to the right, along with chairs or dark furniture edges. A “Classic Commercial Archives” watermark appears on the image.

By the final sampled frame, the scene has shifted to a product-focused shot. A large package or display labeled “Purina HIGH PROTEIN DOG MEAL” fills most of the frame against the same yellow-green background. The package shows the Purina name at the top, large red lettering for the product name, checkerboard trim, and illustrations or photos of dogs along the lower portion. A partially visible person appears to be holding or standing behind the large package, with only an arm and part of a leg visible. A small red-and-white checkerboard Purina-style square appears near the lower right. The watermark remains visible.
